name: ratchet-guide
title: Ratchet system guide
description: Shareable documentation pack for the Ratchet self-hosted AI build-and-verify control plane. Neutral illustrative /srv/ratchet paths only; no secrets, no real hostnames.

documents.title: Ratchet system guide (v1.2) — pack index, start paths, and read order
Elevator pitch, happy-path flow, and component cheat sheet
System map, trust boundaries, end-to-end data flow, and process model
Load-bearing design rules: live is truth, proof of work, streaks, no secrets in builder env
Directory layout, environment files, project.json schema, and run workspace structure
The Ratchet loop contract, deploy strategies, mission YAML, exit codes, and verdict contract
Composer control-plane UI: Build home, queue builder, models, and unified nav
Overnight watchdogs: Lazy observe/ops modes, Medic recovery console, and Sentinel supervisor
Credentials vault: crypto, arm persistence, consumer broker, and provisioner integration
Project shells, product /version requirements, git identity, and host deploys
systemd units, nginx edge, health checks, heal timer, and the operator sidecar cadence
Greenfield rebuild checklist in phases A–E, from host setup to hardening
Paste-ready prompts for rebuild, ops, heal, deploy-timeout, new product, and sidecar agents
Production failure modes: symptom, likely cause, and fix direction
Mock loop, full local loop, mission YAML and project.json examples, and ops snippets
Mermaid gallery: happy path, edge, trust boundaries, loop state, vault sequence, rebuild phases
Single-sheet printable summary of the whole system
Print/PDF-friendly self-contained HTML rendering of the one-pager (letter, inline SVG, no external assets) — served at the extensionless clean URL; backed by one-pager-print.html
Documentation pack history and versioning notes
